news.title:
BHEL rose 5% to ₹264.75, Tata Power hit ₹418.4 (52-wk high) amid strong power sector investments.
Govt's ₹200T investment plan for power boosts renewable integration, distribution reforms, and nuclear opportunities.
news.summary:
BHEL rose 5% to ₹264.75, Tata Power hit ₹418.4 (52-wk high) amid strong power sector investments.
Govt's ₹200T investment plan for power boosts renewable integration, distribution reforms, and nuclear opportunities.

news.title:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.

news.title:
BHEL gains amid momentum in power and capital goods, reflecting positive sentiment.
Glenmark Pharma attracts attention with ongoing interest in the pharmaceutical sector.
news.summary:
BHEL gains amid momentum in power and capital goods, reflecting positive sentiment.
Glenmark Pharma attracts attention with ongoing interest in the pharmaceutical sector.

news.title:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.
news.summary:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.

news.title:
BHEL partners with Titagarh Rail Systems for Vande Bharat sleeper train maintenance.
BHEL approves ₹3064.5 Cr BCGCL investment; plans plant merger from April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
BHEL partners with Titagarh Rail Systems for Vande Bharat sleeper train maintenance.
BHEL approves ₹3064.5 Cr BCGCL investment; plans plant merger from April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Axis Solutions hits 5% upper circuit at Rs 188.2 after Rs 4.25-cr order.
Order involves high voltage transducers supply to Bharat Heavy Electricals (BHEL).
news.summary:
Axis Solutions hits 5% upper circuit at Rs 188.2 after Rs 4.25-cr order.

news.title:
Iran conflict disrupts supply chains, causing raw material shortages and rising costs.
Tamil Nadu industries face challenges in sustaining production amid logistics and energy volatility.

news.title:

BHEL among companies analyzed with target prices and ratings provided.

news.title:
BHEL fined Rs.5.4L by BSE & NSE for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1) on board composition.
BHEL seeks waiver citing govt-appointed directors; pursuing compliance with independent director requirements.
news.summary:
BHEL fined Rs.5.4L by BSE & NSE for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1) on board composition.
BHEL seeks waiver citing govt-appointed directors; pursuing compliance with independent director requirements.

news.title:
BMW Ventures secures Rs.36 crore order for BHEL project, marking its largest fabricated steel products order.
Strategic entry into large-scale infra projects boosts BMW Ventures' growth; listed as BSE 544543, NSE BMWVENTLTD.
news.summary:
BMW Ventures secures Rs.36 crore order for BHEL project, marking its largest fabricated steel products order.
Strategic entry into large-scale infra projects boosts BMW Ventures' growth; listed as BSE 544543, NSE BMWVENTLTD.

news.title:
Commercial Court orders attachment of ₹55.8 Cr from Bharat Heavy Electricals' account following a petition by Indwell Construction.
The company is reviewing the order and exploring legal options; financial impact details not disclosed yet.
news.summary:
Commercial Court orders attachment of ₹55.8 Cr from Bharat Heavy Electricals' account following a petition by Indwell Construction.
The company is reviewing the order and exploring legal options; financial impact details not disclosed yet.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.

news.title:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.
news.summary:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.

news.title:
BHEL secures LoA from SAIL for a turnkey captive power plant package.
The project involves design, supply, erection, and commissioning, excluding civil work.
news.summary:

news.title:
BHEL received a Letter of Acceptance from SAIL for a Captive Power Plant project at IISCO Steel Plant.
The project, valued at Rs 1200-1500 Cr, involves design to commissioning, with completion in 39 months.
news.summary:
